pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 language features, preventing the use of Java 21 syntax and failing to meet the migration target.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler target property to generate Java 21 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the generated bytecode is incompatible with Java 21 runtime expectations and does not utilize Java 21 class file version.
